relics.name: Pyroclasm
relics.description: Fire spread hits harder and farther.

relics.name: Conductor
relics.description: Lightning chains to one extra block.

relics.name: Split Shot
relics.description: Every 6th block destroyed splits off an extra ball.

relics.name: Souljar
relics.description: Every 5th block destroyed pays a crystal.

relics.name: Lodestone
relics.description: Falling bonuses drift toward your paddle.

relics.name: Second Wind
relics.description: The first HP you would lose each level is negated.

relics.name: Sapper's Charge
relics.description: Bomb explosions reach one cell farther.

relics.name: Hellwalker
relics.description: Once per serve, lava rebounds your ball instead of eating it.

relics.name: Pillar Doctrine
relics.description: Statues and columns take +1 ball damage.
